full_transcript: Welcome back to this new video, where I will talk about how you can get content in week by week and what you expect in terms of content So let's start. This is a long journey, you have to work hard for many months. If I talk about the final outcome after 6 months or 9 months, then it will be difficult for you to measure how I am progressing. To streamline this, we have divided the whole course into multiple milestones. A milestone is a logical chunk, which you can do on the basis of independent utility. For example, you can do a milestone, for example, get up. These are the examples of your courses. Once milestone 1 is over, you will have a test on the basis of that milestone. Once milestone 1 is over, you will have a milestone 2. Once milestone 2 is over, you will have a milestone 3. This will comprise of multiple weeks. If I talk about a milestone, it will comprise of multiple modules. For each module, you can think of one week of content. Each module will comprise of multiple modules. For each course, you will get weekly content every week. You will get weekly content every week. You will get weekly content every week. For the recorded content, I need flexibility. If you want, you can split it in two or three hours. For the recorded content, I will ensure that the best of mentors are recording for you. If you have any doubts, you can ask a comment section below the video. For a live field, we will have live doubt classes. You can ask questions related to that lecture. You will get recorded content and your doubts are solved. You will get solutions for that. If these features are not enough, we will have a live field. You will get recorded content and live subject experts. You will get live mentors and advice for that. If you have any doubts, you can ask a comment section below the video. You will get test results every week. You will get recorded content, live subject experts, live doubt, test, assignment, etc. When we understand that we have done weekly content, we will have many milestones in the course. You will get the first milestone in the course. You will get data structures and algorithms. You will get the first milestone in the course. We are in a position to develop some applications.
